since_last: 78% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.43%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 78% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.84% · BTC +0.74% · Gold +0.14% · Nasdaq100 +1.64%. 78% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.43%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.43%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -23.30%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +6.72%, BABA +6.07%, FTNT +5.82%, INTC +5.01%, BBAI +4.84%. Laggards: IBM -23.30%, SKHY -8.61%, ISRG -6.62%, ZBRA -2.89%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.27% at $137.81
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.27% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
